title: Senior Product Manager
summary: Senior Product Manager leading AI, API and developer experience, compliance, healthcare, and fintech initiatives with measurable operational and revenue impact.
achievements: Led development of a conversational product knowledge assistant MVP for a global leader in automotive technology, defining the AI evaluation framework and supporting implementation to improve response quality.
Led developer experience enhancements for a leading US telecom provider, improving API discoverability and accelerating API promotion from internal to external audiences.

Led fintech workflow and KYC redesign across B2B2C flows, contributing to 40% call-center load reduction, 35% operational cost reduction, and 70% fraud reduction while meeting NACHA and CFPB compliance deadlines.
Led healthcare fleet management portal product work for a major medical device manufacturer, with projected first-year savings of $8-10M from self-service workflow adoption.

title: Product Strategist
summary: Product Strategist focused on KPI-led product definition and workshop-driven idea-to-MVP execution.
achievements: Led strategy workshops to align business goals, KPIs, and product direction, validated offering scope, and delivery roadmaps across client engagements.
Redesigned the Product Kickstart workshop series to move client teams from idea to MVP with clearer decision and execution structure.

title: Product Manager
summary: Product Manager for no-code and web3 platform initiatives, including ICO enablement, partner pilots, and protocol launches.
achievements: Defined UX and functionality for a low-code/no-code platform and companion developer-facing web framework.
Led launch of a KYC and token-generation platform used to execute the company's own ICO.
Led decentralized pilot delivery with Warner Music, including partner alignment and next-stage workflow design.
Led GTM and testnet launch execution for Tally payment protocol and companion web app.

title: Product Manager
summary: Fractional product leadership for startups and enterprises across discovery, roadmapping, and execution alignment.
achievements: Led consulting engagements across startup and enterprise contexts, establishing repeatable discovery, roadmapping, and execution-alignment practices.

company: PwC + Google for Work Innovation Lab
title: Product Manager
summary: Product Manager driving pilot-to-production transformation of field-service operations through workflow redesign and cloud migration.
achievements: Owned key discovery tracks for Field Service Optimization, including user interviews, usability studies, and prioritization workshops.
Led workflow redesign and cloud migration planning, coordinating six external vendors and offshore delivery teams.
Contributed to projected $1.4M annual parts savings and reduced billing-cycle latency through system modernization.

title: Co-founder and CTO

achievements: Led product discovery and requirement definition for a commercial real-estate auction platform, delivering an accelerator-accepted prototype.

summary: Product Development Manager leading telecom product delivery and retention-focused workflow redesign.

title: Technical Product Manager
